description: Magical prayer for protection (from every evil, evil eye and impious persons) written (by an unskilled, possibly Hebrew rather than Coptic) hand in the Bohairic (lower Egyptian) dialect of Coptic, plus an (incomplete) Coptic alphabet on the recto, and another (incomplete) Coptic alphabet glossed by Hebrew letters on the verso (the relationship between the Hebrew glosses and the individual Coptic letters is not clear). (Information mainly from Sebastian Richter via FGP.) See also https://www.coptic-magic.phil.uni-wuerzburg.de/index.php/manuscript/kyp-m933/.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בCoptic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
